title: tephrosia limpopoensis
intro: Tephrosia limpopoensis, also known as the Limpopo tephrosia or Limpopo horsefly tree, is a plant species native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Tephrosia limpopoensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments.
